description: Discovery index for framework importers. This is the ONE place real source-framework markers and vendor names appear in the Pulp SDK, and they appear strictly as DATA, never as code. `pulp import detect` ranks a target directory against these markers without any importer installed; the matching importer is a vendor-specific add-on tool resolved by `importer_tool_id` against the tool registry. Detection markers: type=file_glob matches a path under the project dir (shell-style glob, '**' = any depth); type=content_match matches a literal substring within any file matched by `in_glob` (defaults to all regular files). `weight` accumulates into a confidence score normalised to [0,1]. `spi_min`/`spi_max` bound the SPI versions the importer is expected to speak.
